models_for_presentation.Model A: MultiViewAttentionUNet / ResNet34 encoder + CBAM + attention-gated decoder
models_for_presentation.Model B: Task1CINEMultiViewNetV2 / multi-view cine-specific residual attention U-Net
models_for_presentation.Main Model: Validation-selected Task1 ensemble + MultiHeadResUNetPP2D LGE Task2 model
